title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to automate Microsoft 365 to Google Workspace migrations using the Agent Development Kit (ADK). The approach replaces manual assessment processes with a multi-agent architecture that generates structured reports, incorporating techniques like agent orchestration, self-correcting loops, context caching, and priority inference for efficient production deployment.
